content: [Key: Maintain precise facial features, retain original face structure, the character in the image must be completely consistent with the uploaded reference image] High-end photo studio 2x2 grid photo. Top-left panel (Navy Blue background): The character wears a navy blue uniform-style dress, decorated with gold buttons, vintage curls with a blue beret and pearl earrings. She holds up a huge puzzle piece (top-left piece, with the number "20" on it) with both hands, moving it towards the center of the frame. Her eyes are focused on the central puzzle area, her expression is serious, with a slight smile. The background features navy stripes, an anchor, and the text "Set Sail for the New Year". Top-right panel (Cherry Blossom Pink background): The same woman wears a pink lace dress, a pearl necklace, a princess hairstyle with a pink rose hairpin and crystal earrings. She holds up the top-right puzzle piece (with the number "26" on it) with both hands, moving it towards the center to connect with the top-left piece. Her eyes look at the puzzle seam, her expression is focused and expectant, and her body leans forward. The background features pink cherry blossoms, the text "Beautiful Encounter", butterflies, and petals. Bottom-left panel (Mint Green background): The same woman wears a mint green cotton and linen dress, in an artistic style, with natural long hair, a green hairband, and wooden earrings. She holds up the bottom-left puzzle piece (with the text "New Year's Day" on it) with both hands, moving it upwards to connect with the top-left piece. Her eyes look at the puzzle, her expression is serious, and her mouth is slightly pursed. The background features green plants, the text "Hope Grows", new sprouts, and leaves. Bottom-right panel (Lemon Yellow background): The same woman wears a yellow dress with a sunflower pattern, pigtails with yellow bows. She pushes in the last bottom-right puzzle piece (with the text "Happy" on it) to complete the puzzle. The four pieces perfectly form the complete pattern "2026 New Year's Day Happy" in the center of the frame. She tilts her head back, looking at the completed puzzle, her face beaming with a successful, joyful smile. The center of the frame bursts with golden light and confetti. The background features a yellow sun, the text "Complete Success", smiley faces, and sunflowers. The puzzle pieces converge from the four corners to the center to form a complete picture. Clear makeup, bright ring light, 85mm lens, f/1.8 aperture, four-panel composition with puzzle interaction, fashion magazine style.
title: New Year's Day Special: Four-Panel Puzzle for 2026 Blessing
description: A detailed multi-panel prompt for Nano Banana Pro, creating a 2x2 grid photo collage where a single female character, in four different outfits and settings, pieces together a puzzle that spells '2026 New Year's Day Happy' in the center. The prompt specifies precise facial feature retention, clothing details, background elements, and photographic parameters for a fashion magazine style.

content:
A Japanese Edo-period Ukiyo-e woodblock print. The overall feeling is a surreal collaboration between masters like Hokusai and Hiroshige, reimagining modern technology through an ancient lens.

**The scene:** {argument name="modern scene" default="a busy Shibuya scramble crossing"}

**Edo transformation logic:**
Characters wear Edo-era kimono but perform modern actions. All technology is transformed into surreal Edo equivalents:
* Smartphones are glowing, illustrated paper scrolls being read intently.
* Metro stations and trains are giant articulated wooden centipede carriages shuffling through crowds.
* Skyscrapers are reimagined as endless, towering wooden pagodas reaching into dramatic clouds.
* Robots and mecha appear as giant, armored woodblock golems.

The composition uses a flattened perspective with large, bold, hand-carved ink outlines. The background features heavily stylized Ukiyo-e wave patterns and dramatic, swirling clouds, with a distant Mt. Fuji visible on the horizon.

The image must look like a physical print, not a digital painting.
* Texture: strong visible wood grain texture and rough paper fibers throughout the piece.
* Printing imperfections: pigment bleeding is evident. Simulate hand-pressed plates with slight color misalignment for authenticity.
* Color palette: strictly limited to traditional mineral pigments, with dominant use of Prussian blue, vermilion red, and muted yellow ochre.
* Lighting: soft, flat, shadow-free lighting with no digital gradients.

Aspect ratio is 3:4 vertical poster. Include vertical Japanese calligraphy describing the scene and a traditional red artist seal stamp in a corner.
title: Edo-period Ukiyo-e reinterpretation of a modern scene
description: A highly-structured image prompt to depict a modern-day scene reimagined as an Edo-period Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print, with detailed guidance on anachronistic tech, composition, texture, and color.

content:
A wide, cinematic photorealistic night image. In the scene, a {argument name="subject" default="young Asian woman with shoulder-length straight hair"} and a serene demeanor is walking barefoot in profile across mirror-like shallow water. She is wearing an {argument name="outfit" default="elegant, flowing silver-grey sequined gown with spaghetti straps and a high slit"}, which billows subtly as she walks. Her head is slightly lowered.
If a reference photo is provided, please closely match her facial features, hairstyle, skin tone, overall body proportions, and her unique aura; meanwhile, her clothing and accessories can be naturally adjusted to fit the scene.
The water surface features a perfect mirror reflection, but directly beneath her feet, her own reflection is completely replaced by a magnificent and highly detailed spirit-tiger. This spirit-tiger is composed of intricate white-silver lines and emits a soft blue glow. The spirit-tiger appears in a reverse reflection, clearly sniffing a luminous white-gold rose bud (whose light is as pure as moonlight) that exists exclusively within the reflection. A long trail of delicate, glowing rose buds and petals drifts down from the woman's hand, forming an elegant arc that floats up and around her as she walks, ultimately extending down to the glowing rose beneath the spirit-tiger's nose. Faint glowing sparkles shimmer around her bare feet.
The minimalist horizon features distant dark islands. The sky is a deep indigo, dotted with subtle stars, a clear Milky Way, and a massive, glowing full moon. The image features subtle, cool-toned cinematic lighting from the moon and night sky, alongside the internal glow radiating from the spirit-tiger and the rose. Elegant silver-white calligraphy text at the bottom center reads: '{argument name="text" default="In me the tiger sniffs the rose."}' High dynamic range (HDR) night reflections, extreme detail, 8K resolution, surrealism style.
title: Spirit-Tiger Water Walk
description: A surreal and cinematic prompt for Nano Banana 2 featuring a woman walking on water with a spirit-tiger in her reflection.

title: Bread Dough Superheroes
description: A creative prompt for generating unbaked raw bread dough shaped into superheroes, blending comic book style with culinary aesthetics.

content: A cinematic, close-up action shot of a determined {argument name="rider gender" default="female"} motocross rider racing a dusty {argument name="bike color" default="black"} dirt bike through a {argument name="landscape" default="rugged desert landscape"}. She is leaning forward with intense focus, hair windswept, wearing a sleek black athletic shirt, tactical cargo pants, and professional orange-accented motocross boots. Environment & Atmosphere: Setting: A rocky, uneven desert trail at golden hour. Dynamic Effects: Massive clouds of dust and gravel are kicked up by the rear tire, creating a sense of high speed and motion. Background: Jagged mountain silhouettes under a vibrant sunset sky filled with warm orange and soft blue hues. Style & Technical Specs: Lighting: Dramatic backlighting from the setting sun, creating a rim-light effect on the rider and highlighting the texture of the floating dust. Composition: Low-angle shot to emphasize the power of the bike and the scale of the terrain; shallow depth of field with the background mountains softly blurred. Aesthetic: High-contrast, gritty realism, hyper-detailed textures on the dirt, metal, and clothing. Professional photography style.
title: Desert Motocross Action Shot
description: A cinematic action shot of a determined female motocross rider racing through a rugged desert landscape at sunset.

Below the artwork, the text '{argument name="footer text" default="MECHANICAL BLISS - EDITION 01"}' is printed. Above the figure, the word 'serenity' is written in a stylized font."
